self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Sea Shanty (R5): consuming 3 Stoic's Symbols (gained from healing/being healed) on Skill or Burst use grants the Roused effect for 10s: +80 Elemental Mastery per Symbol consumed (240 EM at 3 stacks). Triggers at most once every 15s. The accompanying Energy restoration is not modeled (non-combat).
